name: Teddy Wright
credentials: Computer Science and Economics at the University of Utah, expected Dec 2027. Targeting a PhD — probably in the human-computer interaction, information science, or computational social science space.
blurb: I have a problem where I think about way too many things at once and can't quite pin one down. So writings here span evolutionary biology, game theory, philosophy, the strange shape modern life has taken, and whatever else I feel connects to the strange place the earth is and how we all appeared with consciousness here and have to deal with it.
